author_identification.scholarly_standing: Contemporary scholar specializing in Quranic studies and tajwid, with a focus on manuscript investigation and commentary.

scholarly_context.tradition_position: A modern scholarly contribution to the study of Quranic script, building upon classical works like those of al-Ja'bari.
scholarly_context.historical_significance: Represents contemporary engagement with classical Quranic sciences, particularly the preservation and transmission of the Quranic text.
scholarly_context.muhaqiq_reputation: The author, as both investigator and commentator, demonstrates meticulous attention to detail and deep engagement with the source material.
scholarly_context.tahqiq_methodology_note: Based on a master's thesis, indicating rigorous academic standards and supervised research methodology.
